title: agropyron miserum
intro: Agropyron miserum, also known as False Wheat Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, native to China and Russia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Agropyron miserum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and lowering blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Agropyron miserum can be made into teas, infusions, or dried powders, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
